business.name: Finish Carpentry LLC
business.tagline: Precision trim work and custom millwork for Dallas homes

seo.title: Finish Carpentry LLC | Dallas Custom Trim & Millwork
seo.description: Dallas's premier finish carpentry team. Expert custom trim, crown molding, wainscoting, and built-ins. 5-star service. Call (214) 437-5788 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Custom Trim & Millwork That Elevates Your Home
hero.subheadline: From crown molding to built-in bookcases, we craft timeless woodwork that adds beauty and value.

featureSections.title: Seamless Crown Molding & Baseboards
featureSections.body: Our expert carpenters measure, cut, and install crown molding and baseboards with flawless joints and smooth transitions. We use premium materials and time-tested techniques to ensure a perfect fit every time.
bullets: Custom profiles to match your home's style
Coped inside corners for gap-free joints
Primed and painted for a finished look
featureSections.cardBody: Transform any room with elegant crown molding. Our team handles everything from simple to complex multi-tier designs.

featureSections.title: Tailored Shelving & Cabinetry
featureSections.body: Maximize your space with custom built-in bookcases, entertainment centers, and window seats. Each piece is designed to fit your exact specifications and complement your home's architecture.
bullets: Designed to your dimensions and style
Fully finished and painted or stained
featureSections.cardBody: A custom floor-to-ceiling library with adjustable shelves, hidden storage, and integrated lighting.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision. We take pride in delivering work that stands the test of time.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Design
whyChooseUs.description: We collaborate with you to create custom solutions that reflect your taste and enhance your home's character.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We protect your floors, walls, and furniture. Our team leaves every workspace spotless at the end of each day.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Communicative
whyChooseUs.description: Expect on-time arrivals, clear timelines, and open communication throughout your project. No surprises.

testimonials.quote: The crown molding in our living room is absolutely stunning. The attention to detail was incredible — every corner is perfect.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: They built custom bookshelves for our home office and it completely transformed the space. Professional, fast, and clean.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: We had them do baseboards and window casings throughout our new house. The quality is top-notch and they were a pleasure to work with.
testimonials.author: Angela R.

cta.headline: Ready to Elevate Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Get a free, no-obligation estimate for your next carpentry project.

servicesPage.intro: From intricate crown molding to custom built-ins, our finish carpentry services add elegance and character to every room. We combine old-world craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver exceptional results.

services.title: Crown Molding Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant crown molding that adds architectural interest and value to any room.
services.longDescription: Our crown molding services include custom profiles, multi-tier designs, and seamless coped corners. We work with both primed wood and polyurethane materials to match your style and budget.
benefits: Enhances room aesthetics and home value

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We visit your home, discuss design options, and take precise measurements.

process.title: Fabrication
process.description: We cut and cope molding in our workshop for perfect, gap-free joints.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install the molding with professional-grade adhesives and nails, then caulk and touch up paint.

faqs.question: How long does crown molding installation take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms take 1-2 days, depending on complexity and room size.

faqs.question: Do you paint the molding?
faqs.answer: We install primed molding and can paint it to match your walls, or you can paint it after installation.

services.title: Custom Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Tailored shelving, cabinets, and entertainment centers designed for your space.
services.longDescription: We design and build custom built-in bookcases, window seats, entertainment centers, and more. Each piece is constructed from solid wood and finished to your exact specifications.
benefits: Maximizes unused space and adds storage
Built to last with premium materials

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a detailed design based on your needs and room dimensions.

process.title: Construction
process.description: We build the unit in our shop to ensure precision and quality.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We carefully install the built-in, ensuring a perfect fit and seamless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim and style?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match any existing woodwork or create a complementary design.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We primarily use solid hardwoods like oak, maple, and poplar, as well as high-quality plywood for painted finishes.

services.title: Baseboard & Trim Installation
services.shortDescription: Clean, precise baseboards and door/window casings that complete your rooms.
services.longDescription: We install baseboards, shoe molding, door casings, and window trim with meticulous attention to detail. Our miters are tight, our copes are seamless, and our finishes are flawless.
benefits: Protects walls from scuffs and damage
Available in various profiles and heights

process.title: Measurement
process.answer: We measure each wall and opening to calculate exact material needs.

process.title: Cutting
process.answer: We cut all pieces with precision miter saws and cope joints where needed.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.answer: We nail, fill, sand, and caulk for a seamless appearance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between baseboard and shoe molding?
faqs.answer: Baseboard is the main trim along the wall, while shoe molding is a thin strip at the floor to cover gaps.

faqs.question: Can you install trim over existing tile or hardwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can install quarter round or shoe molding to transition between flooring and baseboards.

services.title: Wainscoting & Wall Paneling
services.shortDescription: Classic wainscoting and board-and-batten that add texture and elegance.
services.longDescription: We install wainscoting, beadboard, board-and-batten, and raised panel walls. These features add depth, character, and a custom look to dining rooms, hallways, and bathrooms.
benefits: Protects walls from wear and tear

process.title: Design Selection
process.description: We help you choose a style that complements your home's architecture.

process.title: Panel Fabrication
process.description: We cut and assemble panels to your exact wall dimensions.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: We install panels with adhesive and nails, then caulk, fill, and paint.

faqs.question: What is the best height for wainscoting?
faqs.answer: Typical heights range from 32 to 48 inches, but we can customize based on ceiling height and room proportions.

faqs.question: Can wainscoting be installed in bathrooms?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use moisture-resistant materials and proper sealing for bathroom installations.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Finish Carpentry Team
about.mission: Our mission is to enhance homes through meticulous craftsmanship, personalized service, and a commitment to excellence.
story: Finish Carpentry LLC was founded on the belief that every home deserves flawless woodwork. Starting as a small crew serving the Lakewood neighborhood, we've grown into one of Dallas's most trusted finish carpentry companies. Our founder, a master carpenter with over 15 years of experience, instilled a culture of precision, honesty, and pride in every project.

Today, we serve homeowners across the Dallas metroplex, from historic M Streets to modern Preston Hollow. We specialize in crown molding, custom built-ins, and trim work that transforms ordinary rooms into extraordinary spaces. Our 5.0 rating reflects our unwavering dedication to quality and customer satisfaction.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We treat every cut and joint as a work of art, using time-honored techniques and modern tools.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest advice, transparent pricing, and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your home and your time — arriving on schedule, protecting your property, and cleaning up thoroughly.

coreValues.title: Collaboration
coreValues.description: We listen to your ideas and work closely with you to bring your vision to life.

contact.headline: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free estimate and discover how we can transform your home.
